problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: Combining Liquid crystal elastomer actuation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
